goals.objective: Build Self-Model Service with calibration, known unknowns, and trend detection
Build Experience Retrieval Service with Qdrant embedding and similarity search
acceptance_criteria: lessons injected in maker context when >= 3 past runs

goals.objective: Build Calibrated Runtime Selection using SelfModel confidence
acceptance_criteria: selects best calibrated runtime when n >= 5
falls back to default when n < 3
never selects runtime with sr < 0.3 unless no alternative

goals.objective: Build Epistemic Gate Service with 4 gate types
acceptance_criteria: perspective_coverage: 1 type -> fail, 2 types + dissent -> pass
falsifiability: testable claim -> pass, vague -> fail

goals.objective: Build Research Loop with DeerFlow executor and epistemic verification
acceptance_criteria: findings written to OKF memory store

goals.objective: Build Curiosity Service with gap detection
acceptance_criteria: >= 1 confidence gap for stale low-confidence concepts
draft cannot route without human approval

goals.objective: Ship Gate: full production proof with all G35-G44 active
